data.title: DOE Selects Radiant for Second HALEU Allocation to Support First Commercial Microreactor at a U.S. Military Installation
data.description: In a recent announcement, a California-based company, Radiant, was chosen by the Department of Energy (DOE) for the second allocation of High-Assay Low-Enriched Uranium (HALEU). This allocation aims to support the deployment of the first commercial microreactor at a U.S. military installation. The selection of Radiant for this crucial allocation signifies a significant step towards advancing nuclear technology in the country.

data.title: OPKO Health to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on July 27, 2026
data.description: On July 23, 2026, OPKO Health, Inc. stated it will release its second-quarter 2026 operational and financial outcomes on July 27, 2026. As a leading healthcare company, OPKO aims to offer innovative solutions for severe illnesses in worldwide markets. The management team of OPKO will conduct a conference call and webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day to present a business overview, review performance, and provide financial projections. The company's stocks are traded on the NASDAQ exchange under the symbol OPK.

Landsbankinn reports financial results for the first half of 2026, showcasing strong performance and growth.

data.title: 'Collectible concession vessels in 'Odyssey' fuel over $100M market as popcorn buckets evolve from basic tubs.'
data.description: A single tub of popcorn used to be just that - a simple concession item. However, the introduction of "collectible concession vessels" has transformed the game. This innovation is expected to rake in over $100 million for a particular chain.

The German Ministry of Defense, in its latest military decision, announced the country's plan to withdraw two of its warships from the Red Sea region.
- REPORTS

data.title: Sunmed™ Endorses Bipartisan Lawful Hemp Protection Act to Protect Small Businesses and Consumer Access
data.description: Sunmed, a top hemp and CBD retailer based in PALMETTO, Fla., declared its full support for The Lawful Hemp Protection Act on July 23, 2026. The Act, sponsored by Congressman Andy Barr (R-KY) and Congresswoman Angie Craig (D-MN), is a significant legislative initiative intending to protect hemp. Sunmed's endorsement underscores the importance of this bill in advancing the hemp industry.

data.title: Amped Fitness Mesa to Open July 27, Bringing the Amped Universe Experience to Mesa
data.description: Amped Fitness® is set to expand its presence in Arizona with the opening of a new location, Amped Fitness Mesa, on Monday, July 23, 2026. This facility boasts eight immersive fitness environments inspired by different destinations. The new location aims to attract fitness enthusiasts with diverse workout options.

data.title: BGL's Summer Analyst Program Recognized as a Top 20 Overall Excellence Winner by Abode
data.description: In Cleveland on July 23, 2026, Brown Gibbons Lang & Company (BGL), a prominent independent investment bank, revealed that its Summer Analyst Program has achieved recognition as one of the Top 20 Winners in Abode's first Early-Career Engagement initiative. This program serves as a platform for young professionals to gain hands-on experience and skills in the financial industry. BGL's accomplishment highlights the success of its initiative in supporting emerging talent, with a notable accomplishment of being recognized among the top performers, indicative of its commitment to fostering growth for future financial leaders.

data.title: Bulleit Frontier Whiskey Introduces New Core Expression: Bulleit '87, The Distillery's First-Ever Blend of Bourbon and Rye
data.description: A recently launched whiskey, named Bulleit '87, combines bourbon and rye that have been finished with toasted staves before being blended together. This unique blend, introduced in Shelbyville, Ky., on July 23, 2026, offers a bold and memorable tasting experience. Bulleit '87 brings together the richness of bourbon with the spice of rye, creating a distinct pour crafted for sipping.

data.title: GIBSON GARAGE MIAMI OPENS TO THE PUBLIC SEPTEMBER 10, 2026, IN THE HEART OF WYNWOOD
data.description: Miami is now home to Gibson's third global Garage location, offering an unparalleled guitar experience with more than 500 instruments, live music, a showcase of local Miami culture, exclusive apparel, custom guitar design services, and the debut of Gibson's first art gallery in the United States. This exciting venture was officially unveiled in Miami on July 23, 2026.

data.title: Great American Media Strikes a Powerful New Chord with "ABILENE," A Bold New, Original Series Coming to Great American Media Platforms Early 2027
data.description: In New York on July 23, 2026, Great American Media revealed their commitment to enhancing their Original Series lineup in 2027 with the introduction of "Abilene," featuring Rose Reid. This marks a significant move in their aggressive expansion strategy, aiming to capitalize on the success of their premium content. The series is expected to attract a wide audience given Reid's popularity from previous works like "Christmas On Every Page" and "Karen."

data.title: TURNBRIDGE EQUITIES OPENS LEASING AT MAILMAN POST, BRINGING 141 NEW BUILD-TO-RENT HOMES TO ONE OF NORTH CAROLINA'S FASTEST-GROWING COMMUNITIES
data.description: A new community in Knightdale is introducing resort-style single family rental homes to the Triangle area. This development boasts amenities such as a clubhouse, pool, fitness center, pickleball court, private yards, garages, and more. Located less than 20 minutes from downtown Raleigh, the community is set to offer luxurious living options for residents. The project is being spearheaded by Turnbridge Equities and promises to bring a unique housing option to the area. Residents can expect a premium living experience with top-notch facilities and convenient access to urban amenities. The development is set to redefine rental living in the region.

data.title: OtterBox Keeps Students Protected, Powered and Connected with Back-to-School Tech Essentials
data.description: In preparation for the upcoming school year, OtterBox in Fort Collins, Colorado, released a line of tech essentials to aid students in staying safe, energized, and linked while on the move. With the increasing demand for protective gear, the company offers a range of products tailored for student life. These items include protective cases for iPads, suitable for storing notes and completing assignments. The tech essentials are designed to cater to the needs of students and ensure they are equipped for success in their academic pursuits.

data.title: Apollo and San Jose Earthquakes Announce Official Sleeve and Go-to-Market Partnership, Bringing the AI GTM System to Major League Soccer
data.description: A groundbreaking collaboration has been unveiled to enable Earthquakes to leverage the growing popularity of soccer through an AI-driven GTM overhaul. The partnership involves Apollo, the AI-based go-to-market system, which has secured a multiyear Official Sleeve Partnership with Major League Soccer team Earthquakes. This innovative venture aims to capitalize on the rising interest in soccer, with the deal set to span several years.

data.title: SEMCAP Beauty & Wellness Announces Minority Investment in Leading Beauty Brand MERIT
data.description: On July 23, 2026, SEMCAP Beauty & Wellness made a minority investment in MERIT, a cosmetics brand based in the US recognized for its contemporary and simple beauty approach. The investment was spearheaded by Vasiliki Petrou, Managing Partner at SEMCAP Beauty.
